Welcome to Project Nocturnus. An original illustrated series exploring the beauty of noctourism — for only half the world reveals itself when we travel by day. 

Make the night your next destination🌕

text:
We are honoured to be named the World's Best Airline at the 2023 Skytrax World Airline Awards! We were also awarded Best First Class Airline, Best First Class Comfort Amenities, and Best Airline in Asia this year. 🥳🙌🏻
 
Our heartfelt thanks to all our customers, as well as to our people for their dedication and hard work. We will continue to innovate and invest in industry-leading products and services to offer a world-class travel experience!
 
#SingaporeAirlines #Skytrax #WorldBestAirline

text:
Happy 60th Birthday, Singapore! 🇸🇬  

We’re proud to share our special medley of “Reach Out for the Skies” and “Home”, performed by the Singapore Airlines Cabin Crew Music Society and the wider SIA family. We hope you love it as much as we enjoyed creating it!   

Songs adapted from “Reach Out for the Skies” by Taufik Batisah and Rui En, composed by Elaine Chan, lyrics by Selena Tan, as well as “Home” by Kit Chan, composed and written by Dick Lee.

text:
From 1st July, all customers can enjoy free unlimited Wi-Fi across all cabin classes.
 
To enjoy this service, Premium Economy Class and Economy Class customers will need to be a KrisFlyer member, and enter their membership details via Manage Booking online or via the SingaporeAir mobile app before their flight.
 
Stay connected, work on-the-go, and stay in touch with your loved ones while flying. Join KrisFlyer for free at bit.ly/JoinKrisFlyer. ✈️🌐📱

#SingaporeAirlines #FlySQ #wifi
